events.event_description: U.S. established a liaison-level presence in Micronesia with Michael Gordon Wygant serving as Representative.

evidence.quote: Michael Gordon Wygant, Representative. Appointed: 1987-07-31. Credentials presented: 1987-10-02. Left post on 1990-05-29.

events.event_description: U.S. elevated its mission in Micronesia to Embassy level with the appointment and credentialing of the first Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary, Aurelia Erskine Brazeal.

evidence.quote: Aurelia Erskine Brazeal, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1990-08-06. Credentials presented: 1990-09-18. Left post on 1993-07-06.
